message:
fix: sort keys in checkDependencyCycles for deterministic cycle detection (gt-e99a4)

Go map iteration order is non-deterministic, causing
ExampleFormula_Validate_cycleDetection to flake — sometimes reporting
the cycle involves 'b' or 'c' instead of the expected 'a'. Sort the
dependency map keys before iterating so the first node visited (and
thus reported) is always alphabetically first.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
